dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】3階

description.en:
Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> debuff from the caster after attacking.
When used on the caster's turn, has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to activate <color=#28d9ed>The Flowers on Earth</color>. Increases the activation chance of <color=#28d9ed>The Flowers on Earth</color> by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> if the caster has a buff.

Unaffected by and has no effect on the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>The Flowers on Earth</color>.
description.jp:
敵単体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で自分の弱体効果を<color=#28d9ed>1</color>個解除する。
このスキルを自分のターンに使用した場合、 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【地にありては花】</color>を発動する。自分に強化効果がある場合、<color=#28d9ed>【地にありては花】</color>の発動確率が<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>UPする。

このスキルで発動された<color=#28d9ed>【地にありては花】</color>は特殊スキル【地にありては花】のスキルターンに影響を受けない。
description.kr:
적을 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 자신의 약화 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 해제합니다.
자신의 턴에 사용 시, <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>땅에는 꽃이</color>를 사용합니다. 강화 효과 보유 시에는 <color=#28d9ed>땅에는 꽃이</color>의 발동 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 증가합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>땅에는 꽃이</color> 스킬 쿨타임의 영향을 주거나 받지 않습니다.
description.zh:
攻击敌人。攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率解除自身的<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个弱化效果。
用于自身回合时,有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率使用<color=#28d9ed>地上有花</color>。附带强化效果时,<color=#28d9ed>地上有花</color>的触发几率提升<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。

<color=#28d9ed>地上有花</color>的冷却时间不会造成或受到影响。

description.en: Recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> of all allies except for the caster by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> of Astei's Max Health, and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.jp: 自分を除く味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を【アステ】の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>回復させ、<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: 자신을 제외한 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 아스테 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 만큼 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 使除自身之外的全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复相当于奥斯黛生命值上限的<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> all allies for <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> of Astei's Max Health and grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nInflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. This effect ignores the target's Resilience.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を【アステ】の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復させ、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。この効果は対象の効果抵抗を無視する。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 아스테 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 만큼 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 부여합니다.\n적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다. 이 효과는 대상의 효과 저항을 무시합니다.
description.zh: 全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复相当于奥斯黛生命值上限的<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,并获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。该效果无视目标的效果抵抗。
